ops.text: {"config":{"arms":{"002":"8b_r32@1950 render-v2 thr 0.1533","v001":"4B render-v1 registered threshold"},"cell":"prereg","cid":"If the prose-stratum sentinel AUC is ~0.5-0.6 for both arms, stop: thresholds cannot separate prose corrective rows, so no operating point helps and the training mix (E12) is the only lever.","decision_rule":"Propose a two-threshold (QA vs prose) candidate iff prose-stratum corrective coverage >= 2x the current fired-corrective count at <= 2x the current budget false-fire rate.","qa_proxy_rule":"Serve-time QA/prose stratifier = render-v2 ask_block marker in the final assistant turn (cc_steer.rendering.ask_block). Gate: agreement with the sidecar QA label (source_kind == 'question_answer') >= 0.95 on the frozen eval-v2, else halt: serve-time stratification is untrustworthy and the two-threshold candidate cannot be served.","seed":1729,"sentinel":"fire iff P(NO_STEER) < threshold"},"config_hash":"7ca6e011dd06","dataset_digest":"96c5503634cf9985","experiment":"E11-threshold-geometry","metrics":{"qa_proxy_floor":0.95},"seed":1729,"verdict":"E11 prereg (dataset_digest 96c5503634cf9985). Decision rule: Propose a two-threshold (QA vs prose) candidate iff prose-stratum corrective coverage >= 2x the current fired-corrective count at <= 2x the current budget false-fire rate. CID: If the prose-stratum sentinel AUC is ~0.5-0.6 for both arms, stop: thresholds cannot separate prose corrective rows, so no operating point helps and the training mix (E12) is the only lever. QA-proxy gate: Serve-time QA/prose stratifier = render-v2 ask_block marker in the final assistant turn (cc_steer.rendering.ask_block). Gate: agreement with the sidecar QA label (source_kind == 'question_answer') >= 0.95 on the frozen eval-v2, else halt: serve-time stratification is untrustworthy and the two-threshold candidate cannot be served."}
